messages.content: unanticipated中文
unanticipated的中文是“预料之外的”或“出乎意料的”。
LQ560V100 开发环境用户指南 翻译为英文
The translation of "LQ560V100 开发环境用户指南" into English is "LQ560V100 Development Environment User Guide."

概述
本文档介绍Linux开发环境的搭建
本文档主要提供让客户更快地了解Linux开发环境指导。
翻译为英文

Overview
This document provides guidance on setting up the Linux development environment. It aims to help customers gain a better and faster understanding of the Linux development environment.
本文以LQ560V100PLUS描述为例，如未有特殊说明，LQ560V100LITE和LQ560V100PLUS一致 翻译为英文
This document takes the LQ560V100PLUS as an example. Unless otherwise specified, the instructions in this document are applicable to both the LQ560V100LITE and LQ560V100PLUS.
与本文档相对应的产品版本如下 翻译为英文
The corresponding product versions for this document are as follows.

本文档（本指南）主要适用于以下工程师：
●	技术支持工程师
●	软件开发工程师 翻译为英文

This document (this guide) is primarily intended for the following engineers:
● Technical support engineers
● Software development engineers
读者对象  修改记录 翻译为英文

Target audience: 

The intended audience for this document is:

- Technical support engineers
- Software development engineers

Change log:

Modification record:

1	开发环境
1.1	开发组网
LQ560V100PLUS开发环境通常包括Linux服务器、Windows和
LQ560V100PLUSDEMO BOARD（目标板），三者同处于一个网络中，如图1-2所示
图 1-2 LQ560V100PLUS 开发环境
在Linux服务器上建立交叉编译环境，Windows通过串口和网口与LQ560V100PLUS单板连接，开发人员可以在Windows中进行程序开发和烧写或者远程登录到Linux服务器进行程序开发。各部分具体软件介绍如表1-1所示。Linux内核基于Linux标准内核5.10 版本移植开发，根文件系统基于busybox制作而成。翻译为英文

1. Development Environment
1.1 Networking in Development
The development environment for LQ560V100PLUS typically includes a Linux server, Windows, and the LQ560V100PLUS DEMO BOARD (target board), all connected within a network as shown in Figure 1-2.
Figure 1-2 LQ560V100PLUS Development Environment
A cross-compilation environment is set up on the Linux server, and Windows is connected to the LQ560V100PLUS board through a serial port and network port. Developers can perform program development, flashing, or remotely log in to the Linux server for program development on Windows. Specific software introductions for each component are shown in Table 1-1. The Linux kernel is ported and developed based on the Linux Standard Kernel version 5.10, and the root file system is created based on busybox.
第1次临时版本发布

First Temporary Version Release

Version: 1.0

This is the first temporary version release of the document. It includes information on the development environment, networking in development, and specific software introductions. The document is primarily intended for technical support engineers and software development engineers. Please note that this version is subject to further revisions and updates. Feedback and suggestions for improvement are welcome.
LQ560V100PLUS 组网各部分描述；   建议选择完全安装Ubuntu 20.04。 包含busybox常用命令。 翻译为英文

Networking Description for LQ560V100PLUS:

The networking setup for LQ560V100PLUS includes the following components:

1. Linux Server: This server acts as the central hub for development operations. It hosts the cross-compilation environment and provides access to various development tools and resources.

2. Windows: Windows OS is used for program development, flashing, and remote login. Developers can use Windows-based software tools to develop and deploy programs on the LQ560V100PLUS board.

3. LQ560V100PLUS DEMO BOARD: This target board is connected to both the Linux server and Windows through a serial port and network port. It serves as the development platform for testing and running programs.

It is recommended to choose a complete installation of Ubuntu 20.04 for the Linux server. This ensures that all necessary components and dependencies are included for smooth development operations.

Moreover, the Ubuntu 20.04 installation should include the busybox package with commonly used commands. Busybox provides a collection of lightweight and essential Unix utilities that are useful for various development tasks.

Note: The above networking description and installation recommendations may vary based on specific requirements and configurations.

1.2	搭建开发环境
推荐用户使用64位Linux服务器，不建议在32位Linux服务器开发，可能存在未知的兼容性问题。
推荐的硬件配置如下：
●	CPU Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU E5-2450 0 @ 2.10GHz 或更好CPU
●	DDR: >= 32GB
●	Hard disk >= 500GB
●	Ethernet
●	OS: Ubuntu 20.04 64bit
1.2.1	发布包使用的 Linux Server 版本
本开发包默认均以此Linux系统进行编译：
Ubuntu 20.04	
1.2.2	网络环境搭建
请自行配置网络，并安装nfs， ssh等网络组件。
1.2.3	软件包安装
Ubuntu安装好后，且用户已自行配置好网络环境，则可继续如下步骤完成相关软件包的安装：
步骤1 Shell默认配置为bash
执行sudo dpkg-reconfigure dash 选择 no
步骤2 安装软件包
执行
sudo apt-get install make libc6-i386 lib32z1 lib32stdc++6 zlib1g-dev libncurses5-dev ncurses-term libncursesw5-dev g++ u-boot-tools texinfo gawk libssl-dev openssl bc p7zip-full gperf bison flex diffutils git unzip libffi-dev libtool libfreetype6 zlib1g-dev liblzo2-dev uuid-dev pkg-config automake texlive
步骤3 配置pkgconfig
执行
export PKG_CONFIG_PATH="$PKG_CONFIG_PATH:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/ pkgconfig"
步骤4 依赖 python3相关库
下载安装并执行如下指令：
sudo apt install python3-pip  python-is-python3
可能需要配置下载源：请创建并配置pip源，编辑:
翻译

1.2 Setting up the Development Environment

It is recommended to use a 64-bit Linux server for the development environment. Developing on a 32-bit Linux server is not recommended as it may encounter unknown compatibility issues.

The recommended hardware configuration is as follows:
- CPU: Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU E5-2450 0 @ 2.10GHz, or a better CPU.
- DDR: >= 32GB
- Hard disk: >= 500GB
- Ethernet
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04 64-bit

1.2.1 Linux Server Version for Package Releases

The development package is compiled by default on the following Linux system:
- Ubuntu 20.04

1.2.2 Setting Up the Network Environment

Please configure the network environment and install necessary network components such as NFS and SSH.

1.2.3 Software Package Installation

Once Ubuntu is installed and the network environment is configured, follow the steps below to complete the installation of the required software packages:

Step 1: Set the default shell to bash
Execute the following command:
sudo dpkg-reconfigure dash (select "no")

Step 2: Install the software packages
Execute the following command:
sudo apt-get install make libc6-i386 lib32z1 lib32stdc++6 zlib1g-dev libncurses5-dev ncurses-term libncursesw5-dev g++ u-boot-tools texinfo gawk libssl-dev openssl bc p7zip-full gperf bison flex diffutils git unzip libffi-dev libtool libfreetype6 zlib1g-dev liblzo2-dev uuid-dev pkg-config automake texlive

Step 3: Configure pkgconfig
Execute the following command:
export PKG_CONFIG_PATH="$PKG_CONFIG_PATH:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/pkgconfig"

Step 4: Install Python3 dependencies
Download and install the following packages by executing the commands:
sudo apt install python3-pip python-is-python3

It may require configuring the download source: Please create and configure the pip source by editing the file:

请创建并配置pip源，编辑（Please create and configure pip source, edit）:

1.2.4	安装交叉编译工具

 	须知	
使用从网络等渠道得到的交叉编译工具可能存在与使用的内核并不配套，造成开发过程中出现一些不可预料的问题。

发布包提供编译工具链aarch64-otv01-linux-glibc-(路径位于SDK代码包tools/pc/ot_toolchain下) 。aarch64-otv01-linux-glibc-为基于64bit操作系统glibc的工具链。
安装步骤如下： 步骤1  解压工具链。
执行如下命令进行解压：
tar xzf gcc-aarch64-otv01-linux-glibc.tgz	
步骤2 安装工具链。
运行如下命令完成此工具链的安装。
cd gcc-aarch64-otv01-linux-gnu
sudo ./install_gcc_toolchain.sh
source /etc/profile

2	安装SDK
2.1	下载SDK包
请客户从欧冶FAE申请软件SDK包。其中
LQ560V100_SDK_V100R001C0[X]SPC[XYZ].tar.gz的文件，就是LQ560V100PLUS/LITE的软件开
发包。

2.2	解压缩包
在Linux服务器上，创建客户自有目录，拷贝SDK包到当前目录，并执行
tar -zxvf LQ560V100_SDK_V100R001C0[X]SPC[XYZ].tar.gz
解压软件包到当前目录下

2.3	编译SDK包
在步骤2.2中创建的目录下，执行
cd sdk_lq560v100
make -j8

上述命令中，“-j8”可根据客户自有服务器能力进行修改。

编译完成后会在main/src/platform/pub下生成lq560v100plus_image_glibc目录，目录下为版本可烧写镜像文件。

3	烧写SDK镜像
参考《LQ560V100 OTBurnTool烧写工具指南》进行烧写

4	使用SDK
4.1	配置demo板网络

步骤1 设置网络
ifconfig eth0 hw ether xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx; 
ifconfig eth0 xx.xx.xx.xx netmask xx.xx.xx.xx; 
route add default gw xx.xx.xx.xx

步骤2 然后ping一下PC IP地址，如无意外，网络会正常工作

4.2	使用nfs进行开发
步骤1 在开发阶段，推荐使用NFS作为开发环境，可以省去重新制作和烧写根文件系统的
工作；需确认linux服务器和Demo板网络环境已经互通
步骤2 执行挂载NFS文件系统的命令
mount -t nfs -o nolock -o tcp xx.xx.xx.xx:/sdk_path /mnt
命令中xx.xx.xx.xx为linux服务器IP地址
步骤3 挂载完成后可在/mnt目录下看到对应的SDK文件

4.3	加载基础运行环境
基于4.2挂载完成后，在Demo板下，进入/mnt/sdk_path/main/src/out/ko目录。
执行：
./load_lq560v100 -i

4.4	运行sample
请客户首先保证Demo板对应的sensor和屏幕相关连线都已经连接好。
在Demo板下，进入/mnt/sdk_path/main/src/component/media/sample/vi目录。执行：
./sample_vi 0
在Demo板对应屏幕上可看到sensor采集的图像
翻译

1.2.4 Installing Cross-Compilation Tools

Note:
Using cross-compilation tools obtained from the internet or other sources may result in unforeseen issues if they are not compatible with the kernel being used during development.

The release package provides a compilation toolchain called aarch64-otv01-linux-glibc (located in the SDK code package at tools/pc/ot_toolchain path). This toolchain is based on the glibc of a 64-bit operating system.
Follow the steps below for installation:

Step 1: Unpack the toolchain
Execute the following command to unpack the toolchain:
tar xzf gcc-aarch64-otv01-linux-glibc.tgz

Step 2: Install the toolchain
Run the following command to install the toolchain:
cd gcc-aarch64-otv01-linux-gnu
sudo ./install_gcc_toolchain.sh
source /etc/profile

2 Installing the SDK
2.1 Downloading the SDK Package
Please request the software SDK package from our FAE at EuroTech. The file named LQ560V100_SDK_V100R001C0[X]SPC[XYZ].tar.gz is the software development package for LQ560V100PLUS/LITE.

2.2 Unpacking the Package
On the Linux server, create a directory and copy the SDK package to the current directory. Then execute the following command:
tar -zxvf LQ560V100_SDK_V100R001C0[X]SPC[XYZ].tar.gz

The software package will be unpacked in the current directory.

2.3 Compiling the SDK Package
In the directory created in step 2.2, execute the following command:
cd sdk_lq560v100
make -j8

In the above command, "-j8" can be modified based on the capabilities of your own server.

After the compilation is complete, the lq560v100plus_image_glibc directory will be generated under main/src/platform/pub directory. This directory contains the version's burnable image files.

3 Burning the SDK Image
Refer to the "LQ560V100 OTBurnTool User Guide" for instructions on burning the image.

4 Using the SDK
4.1 Configuring the Demo Board Network

Step 1: Network Setup
ifconfig eth0 hw ether xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx;
ifconfig eth0 xx.xx.xx.xx netmask xx.xx.xx.xx;
route add default gw xx.xx.xx.xx

Step 2: Ping the PC's IP Address
If all goes well, the network will be functioning properly.

4.2 Development with NFS
Step 1: During the development phase, it is recommended to use NFS as the development environment to avoid the need for creating and burning a root file system again. Ensure that the Linux server and the Demo board are in a network-accessible environment.
Step 2: Execute the command:
mount -t nfs -o nolock -o tcp xx.xx.xx.xx:/sdk_path /mnt
where xx.xx.xx.xx is the IP address of the Linux server.
Step 3: After mounting is complete, the corresponding SDK files will be visible in the /mnt directory.

4.3 Loading the Basic Runtime Environment
After completing the mount in step 4.2, go to /mnt/sdk_path/main/src/out/ko directory inside the Demo board. Execute:
./load_lq560v100 -i

4.4 Running the Sample
Before running the sample, ensure that the Demo board is connected to the appropriate sensor and screen.
Inside the Demo board, go to /mnt/sdk_path/main/src/component/media/sample/vi directory. Execute:
./sample_vi 0

You will see the image captured by the sensor displayed on the Demo board's corresponding screen.

All rights reserved. © EuroTech Semiconductor Co., Ltd.

本文档主要介绍OTBurnTool烧写工具的使用方法，适用于如下场景：
	一键烧写所有程序镜像到单板flash上的场景
	单板已有boot可按地址烧写其他程序镜像到单flash上的场景
	空板上只烧写boot到单板flash上的场景。
翻译

This document primarily introduces the usage of OTBurnTool for writing programs. It is applicable to the following scenarios:

- One-click burning of all program images to the flash of the board
- Burning additional program images to the flash of the board with an existing boot by address
- Burning only the boot to the flash
